samples.gvd:
module accu(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    input valid_in,
    output valid_out,
    output [9:0] data_out
);
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="accu">
    <description>Accumulate 4 input data and output the result.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data for addition.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating readiness for new data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating when 4 input data accumulation is reached.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[9:0]">10-bit output data representing the accumulated sum.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" width_description="[1:0]">
            <enum-value id="idle" value="0">Idle state, waiting for valid_in.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="accumulate" value="1">Accumulate state, ready to receive data_in.</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="valid_out_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to hold the valid_out value.</description>
            <init-value>0</init-value>
        </reg>
        <reg id="data_out_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to hold the accumulated sum.</description>
            <width>[9:0]</width>
            <init-value>0</init-value>
        </reg>
        <reg id="state_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>State register for FSM.</description>
            <width>[1:0]</width>
            <init-value>0</init-value>
        </reg>
        <reg id="count_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Counter register to count the number of received data_in.</description>
            <width>[1:0]</width>
            <init-value>0</init-value>
        </reg>
        <reg id="sum_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to hold the sum of data_in.</description>
            <width>[9:0]</width>
            <init-value>0</init-value>
        </reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <description>Reset valid_out_reg and state_reg on reset.</description>
        <always @("posedge clk or negedge rst_n")>
            if (!rst_n) begin
                valid_out_reg <= 0;
                state_reg <= 0;
            end
            else begin
                case (state_reg)
                    `idle: begin
                        <description>Idle state, wait for valid_in.</description>
                        if (valid_in) begin
                            state_reg <= `accumulate;
                        end
                    end
                    `accumulate: begin
                        <description>Accumulate state, ready to receive data_in.</description>
                        if (count_reg == 2'b11) begin
                            valid_out_reg <= 1;
                            data_out_reg <= sum_reg;
                            state_reg <= `idle;
                        end
                        else begin
                            count_reg <= count_reg + 1;
                            sum_reg <= sum_reg + data_in;
                        end
                    end
                endcase
            end
        </always>
    </implementation>
</module>
